race.comment: THREE REEL ROSES (7) ran below their best last time after being in contention on the turn at Kilmore, finishing tenth and beaten 12 lengths starting at $4.40. She's another that can turn things around quickly having run well at Echuca prior. NINYO (8) finished midfield at her first run back from a spell last start, beaten 7 lengths over 1590m at Wangaratta on soft going when in the market. Quickly up in trip here but will be fitter and should take holding out.  SMOKIN' ROHIE (6) struggled last time but the fresh run was good and he draws to settle closer now up in trip, look for a better run. JAZ TYCOON (2) was okay at Echuca last time, up in trip is a bit of a query as favourite but he has won here.
